name: Emily
lifeContext: I juggle a full-time job and managing my household, including planning my kids' birthday parties. Time is always tight, and I rely on efficient solutions to keep everything on track.
triggerMoment: I realize the physical birthday invitation flyers I ordered haven’t arrived yet, and the party is just a few days away. I feel the stress mounting because I need to get the invites out immediately to ensure friends and family can come.
objections: Will the digital invitation look personal and special enough?
Is it really easy to create and send without wasting time?
Will everyone receive the invite promptly without technical issues?
aspirations: To send invitations quickly without last-minute panic
To feel confident that all guests are informed on time
To have a simple, stress-free way to create and share beautiful invites
voiceTone: Warm, approachable, and reassuring, like a helpful friend who understands the chaos of party planning
contextBeforeProduct: I’m staring at my phone, anxiously refreshing the tracking number for the physical flyers, realizing they won’t arrive in time. The clock is ticking, and I feel overwhelmed trying to figure out a backup plan.
whyNow: Because the party date is close and physical invites won’t make it on time, I need an immediate solution to avoid disappointing my child and guests.
whatFeelsMessy: Coordinating last-minute flyer orders, worrying about guests not getting invitations, and scrambling to find an easy way to notify everyone quickly.
whatSuccessLooksLike: I instantly create and send a personalized live digital invitation that my friends and family receive immediately, giving me peace of mind and more time to focus on the party itself.
whatWouldMakeHerSend: A simple, user-friendly platform where I enter the birthday details, see a beautiful live invitation preview, and can send it right away without complicated steps or delays.
